creator: yongari@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

See http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2008-July/043522.html 
for more details why we have re(4) and rl(4) for RealTek 
controllers. Recent controllers from RealTek should be supported by 
re(4). If you find a hardware that is not supported by re(4) please 
open a new PR for that.
